meta.title: Rajasthan Royals vs Gujarat Titans · Qualifier 2
meta.subtitle: IPL 2026 · Maharaja Yadavindra Singh Stadium · Live
meta.disclaimer: Generated during early live play · Match in progress

chunks.label: Stakes
chunks.title: A direct ticket to the IPL 2026 Grand Final against RCB

blocks.content: This is a straight knockout semifinal where everything is on the line. The winner earns the remaining spot in the Grand Final against Royal Challengers Bengaluru on May 31, while the loser is officially eliminated.
Winner-takes-all clash to determine who challenges RCB for the title.

chunks.label: Venue & conditions
chunks.title: Royals break the template on a used Chandigarh pitch

blocks.content: Rajasthan Royals won the controversial retake toss and boldly elected to bat first. Both captains expected the used surface to slow down considerably as the game progresses, making high middle-over spin a massive handicap for the chasing side.
Rajasthan Royals won the toss and chose to bat first to exploit a slowing pitch.

chunks.label: Season snapshot
chunks.title: Top-two Titans seek redemption while Royals ride momentum

blocks.content: Gujarat Titans look to wipe away a bruising 92-run defeat against RCB in Qualifier 1. Rajasthan Royals keep their playoff momentum going after comprehensively dismissing Sunrisers Hyderabad in the Eliminator match.

chunks.label: Head-to-head
chunks.title: Titans dominate long term but shared honors in 2026

chunks.label: Recent form
chunks.title: Titans leaking runs lately while Royals bounce back

blocks.content: Gujarat's four-game win streak was snapped when they leaked 254 runs to RCB. Rajasthan broke a late four-game losing streak with their clutch victory in the Eliminator.

chunks.label: Playing XI
chunks.title: Confirmed lineups locked in with spin enforcement for GT

blocks.content: Rajasthan Royals: Yashasvi Jaiswal, Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, Dhruv Jurel, Riyan Parag (c), Donovan Ferreira, Dasun Shanaka, Ravindra Jadeja, Jofra Archer, Nandre Burger, Brijesh Sharma, Yash Raj Punja.
Gujarat Titans: Sai Sudharsan, Shubman Gill (c), Jos Buttler, Jason Holder, Washington Sundar, Nishant Sindhu, Rashid Khan, Sai Kishore, Kagiso Rabada, Prasidh Krishna, Mohammed Siraj.
Gujarat Titans have tactical reinforcement, bringing in left-arm spinner R Sai Kishore on the used track.

chunks.label: Bowling attack
chunks.title: Titans middle over restriction meets Royals explosive openers

blocks.content: Gujarat Titans have the most middle-over wickets (overs 7-15) this season alongside the highest dot-ball percentage. They will need to deploy Rashid Khan and Sai Kishore to claw back after powerplay damage.

chunks.label: Key matchup
chunks.title: India's elite seamers vs Rajasthan's high-risk top order

blocks.content: If GT run into a firing top order, chasing on a turning used track will be a historic uphill task as they have lost 7 consecutive 210+ chases since 2025.

chunks.label: One to watch
chunks.title: The 15-year old batting marvel holds the keys

blocks.content: Teenage phenom Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is the outright anchor for RR's explosive 10+ run rate style. His survival determines Rajasthan's safe ceiling.
